---
name: New failure mode
about: Propose a new AFM entry
title: "AFM proposal: <name>"
labels: new-mode
---

**Name** (short, sticky):

**Definition** (one paragraph, crisply distinct from every existing entry — say which existing AFM it is closest to and why it is not that):

**Transcript signature** (what it looks like in a real session):

**Evidence** (required — pick one):
- [ ] A graded transcript (attach or link raw output)
- [ ] A reproducible trap (rulebench format preferred)
- [ ] Public incident links (qualifies for **Reported** grade only)

**Detect / Intervene / Prevent** (best effort; maintainers will help sharpen):
